productDisplayName: Peter England Men Essentials Grey  Melange Brief
description: A hot favourite from the peter england essentials collection, this V-cut brief is crafted from a quick dry, soft 100% cotton fabric. The V-cut of this brief allows free leg movement, while the label on the outer side of the waistband offers abrasion-free comfort. Crafted from 100% cotton Broad and stretchable waistband in that sits snug and comfortably Brand label on the front of the waistband for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Machine wash warm using a non chlorine bleach Wash with like colours Dry in shade Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
